message:
feat(core,membrane): expand libc surface coverage and harden runtime math proofs

Core library expansions across multiple API families (+540 lines):

stdio:
- stdio_abi.rs: extend ABI surface with additional FILE operation stubs
- buffer.rs: add 52 lines of buffer management logic for setvbuf/fflush
  semantics
- file.rs: expand FILE struct operations with fopen mode parsing, fseek
  offset calculations, and ferror/feof state tracking (+69 lines)

string:
- mem.rs: add memcmp, memchr, memmove with overlap-safe semantics
  (+46 lines)
- str.rs: add strncmp, strchr, strrchr, strstr implementations with
  null-terminator awareness (+51 lines)

stdlib:
- conversion.rs: add strtol/strtoul with full base detection (0x, 0o,
  0b prefixes), overflow clamping to LONG_MIN/LONG_MAX, and endptr
  output (+47 lines)

math:
- trig.rs: add sinf/cosf/tanf single-precision wrappers with range
  reduction (+23 lines)

pthread:
- mutex.rs: expand mutex implementation with trylock, timed-lock stubs,
  and recursive mutex counter tracking (+59 lines)

Cargo.toml: add new dev-dependencies for expanded test coverage

Membrane runtime math hardening:
- persistence.rs: add 56-line proof-persistence layer for archiving
  runtime math verification results to structured JSONL
- cohomology.rs: extend with 19-line sheaf-consistency validator
- grobner_normalizer.rs: add 54-line Gröbner basis normal-form
  reduction with monomial ordering proofs
- grothendieck_glue.rs: add 50-line glue-compatibility checker for
  Grothendieck topology coverage maps
- clifford.rs: minor doc expansion (+2 lines)

Beads: sync issue tracker metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
